# platformResourceInstallationsRollback

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the platformResourceInstallationsRollback mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk platform-resource-installations-rollback --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.commitId <UUID> --input.targetInstallationId <UUID>
```
